name: Red & Black Bean Buffalo Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, or salt to taste, diced
2 ears sweet corn, chopped fresh cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook meat in a large nonaluminum Dutch oven until no longer pink.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except cilantro.
3. Simmer gently, partially covered and stirring frequently for 40 to 45 minutes.
4. Taste and adjust seasonings.
5. Add cilantro at serving time.
This recipe is adapted from one used at the Heartland Cafe on Chicago's north side. It uses dried, cooked beans, although canned beans are a fine short-order alternative. If desired, the chili can be served with grated cheese, sour cream, chopped green onions, tortillas or crackers.
